descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes defeat Pembroke Lumber Kings 4-1 to go 2-0 in Centennial Cup round-robin play.
descriptionLong: The Richmond Sockeyes won 4-1 over Pembroke Lumber Kings on Monday night at the Centennial Cup junior-A championship tournament in Humboldt, Saskatchewan. The Sockeyes' third-period explosion gave British Columbia's champions a 2-0 record and first-place tie with the Saskatchewan champion Humboldt Broncos. Dave Tomlinson scored twice, with Brian Kozak and Stan Czenczek (winning goal) adding one each.
